# modules

NixOS module collection aggregated by `default.nix` as a named attrset; parent flake consumes via `import ./modules`. Each entry maps a service name to either a `.nix` file or subdirectory module.

## Contents

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| [default.nix](./default.nix) | Aggregator attrset: exports `timew-sync-server`, `g13d`, `taskchampion-sync-server`. Add new modules here. |
| [taskchampion-sync-server.nix](./taskchampion-sync-server.nix) | NixOS service module for TaskChampion sync server; declares `config.services.taskchampion-sync-server` options and systemd unit. |

## Subdirectories

| Dir | Summary |
|-----|---------|
| [g13d/](./g13d/) | NixOS module for Logitech G13 daemon; systemd service + tmpfiles pipe dir, config serialized via `pkgs.writeText`. |
| [timew-sync-server/](./timew-sync-server/) | NixOS service module for Timewarrior sync; two systemd units (`timew-sync-server-init` oneshot + persistent daemon), optional firewall. |

## API Surface

`default.nix` exports:

```nix
{
  timew-sync-server = ./timew-sync-server;   # dir
  g13d              = ./g13d;                # dir
  taskchampion-sync-server = ./taskchampion-sync-server.nix;
}
```

## Configuration

`taskchampion-sync-server` options under `config.services.taskchampion-sync-server`:

| Option | Type | Default |
|--------|------|---------|
| `enable` | `mkEnableOption` | `false` |
| `package` | `mkPackageOption` | `pkgs.taskchampion-sync-server` |
| `user` | `types.str` | `"taskchampion"` |
| `group` | `types.str` | `"taskchampion"` |
| `port` | `types.port` | `10222` |
| `openFirewall` | `mkEnableOption` | `false` |
| `dataDir` | `types.path` | `"/var/lib/taskchampion-sync-server"` |
| `snapshot.versions` | `types.ints.positive` | `100` |
| `snapshot.days` | `types.ints.positive` | `14` |

## Behavioral Contracts

`taskchampion-sync-server` `ExecStart` (verbatim flags):
```
lib.getExe cfg.package --port <port> --data-dir <dataDir> --snapshot-versions <snapshot.versions> --snapshot-days <snapshot.days>
```

`systemd.tmpfiles` rule `"10-taskchampion-sync-server"`: creates `cfg.dataDir`, mode `0750`, owner `cfg.user:cfg.group`.

Firewall: `networking.firewall.allowedTCPPorts` appends `cfg.port` only when `openFirewall` set.

## Patterns

All three modules follow same structure: `mkEnableOption` gates `lib.mkIf cfg.enable`; system user/group declared via `users.users`/`users.groups`; `systemd.services.<name>` targets `network.target` or `network-online.target`; optional `networking.firewall.allowedTCPPorts` via `lib.mkIf cfg.openFirewall`.
